revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Further reading cleanup}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Further reading cleanup | subst= <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = style | issue= This "[[Wikipedia:Manual_of_Style/Layout#Further_reading|Further reading]]" section '''may need cleanup'''. | fix = Please read the [[Wikipedia:Further reading|editing guide]] and help improve the section. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Wikipedia spam cleanup | all = Wikipedia further reading cleanup | all2 = {{#if:{{{1|}}}|Further reading cleanup templates with parameter 1}} |removalnotice = yes }}<!--{{Further reading cleanup}} end--> }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23417362209|time triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Further_reading_cleanup here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Further_reading_cleanup for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Further reading cleanup}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Further reading cleanup | subst= <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = style | issue= This "[[Wikipedia:Manual_of_Style/Layout#Further_reading|Further reading]]" section '''may need cleanup'''. | fix = Please read the [[Wikipedia:Further reading|editing guide]] and help improve the section. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Wikipedia spam cleanup | all = Wikipedia further reading cleanup | all2 = {{#if:{{{1|}}}|Further reading cleanup templates with parameter 1}} |removalnotice = yes }}<!--{{Further reading cleanup}} end--> }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Further_reading_cleanup for full history.
